pages.text: The Vampiric Scythe is the flagship lifesteal weapon. It deals 11 damage with netherite durability, and refuses the three vampiric enchantments since its power already reflects that theme.
The Blood Relic is a curio themed around PvP combat and vampirism. When Curios is installed it can be worn in a curio slot for passive bonuses. Without Curios it still exists as an item.
